2026-04-19T06:06:48.9717889Z [36;1m# Derive GH_HOST from GITHUB_SERVER_URL so the gh CLI targets the correct[0m
2026-04-19T06:06:48.9718901Z [36;1m# GitHub instance (GHES/GHEC). On github.com this is a harmless no-op.[0m
2026-04-19T06:06:48.9719794Z [36;1mGH_HOST="${GITHUB_SERVER_URL#https://}"[0m
